_comment: FICTITIOUS EXAMPLE for schema validation only — not real facts or experimental data.
question: What is the official mascot color of the fictional university 'Northwood Institute' in the novel series 'Glass Harbor'?
internal_answer: The mascot color is traditionally described as deep blue in widely circulated summaries of the novels.
external_evidence: According to the author's revised appendix (Document NH-7): 'Northwood Institute's mascot color was changed to silver-green in the 2019 continuity revision.'
resolution_rule: When the retrieved appendix is marked as the authoritative continuity revision, prefer external_evidence over parametric summaries that reflect pre-revision lore.
chosen_answer: Under the 2019 continuity revision (Document NH-7), the official mascot color is silver-green.
rejected_answer: The official mascot color is deep blue.
condition: Applies when the question targets canon after the 2019 revision and NH-7 is in context.
notes: Synthetic example; do not use for training or evaluation reporting.
